basic_details.job_title: DHS Chikkaballapur General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Health Society Chikkaballapur (DHS Chikkaballapur) General Duty Medical Officer Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website of DHS Chikkaballapur. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the DHS Chikkaballapur General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026.

all_official_links.label: Download DHS Chikkaballapur General Duty Medical Officer Job 2026 Notification P

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHS Chikkaballapur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply for the DHS Chikkaballapur General Duty Medical Officer recruitment is 31 August 2026. Candidates are advised to attend the walk-in interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the qualification required for the General Duty Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The required qualification for the General Duty Medical Officer post is an MBBS Degree. Ensure you possess this degree to be eligible for the recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the General Duty Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies available for the General Duty Medical Officer post in the District Health Society Chikkaballapur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the General Duty Medical Officer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the General Duty Medical Officer position will receive a salary of Rs. 622666 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the DHS Chikkaballapur General Duty Medical Officer recruitment is scheduled for 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the General Duty Medical Officer posts in DHS Chikkaballapur is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the District Health Society Chikkaballapur located?
faq.answer: District Health Society Chikkaballapur is located in Chikkaballapur, Karnataka, with the pincode 562101.
